prompt: Alex (Black woman, early 40s, medium-length locs pulled back, tortoiseshell reading glasses pushed up on her head, charcoal blazer over a simple white top) stands in front of a large wall-mounted display in a bright modern office. The display shows an abstract network map — glowing teal nodes of different sizes connected by thin lines, like a constellation. Alex reaches toward one of the nodes, about to tap it. Her expression is curious and purposeful. The display casts a soft teal glow on her face. The wall around the screen is clean white. Wide shot, showing Alex at about two-thirds height against the large screen. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Alex reaches toward a glowing network map on a wall display, about to select a new publisher node from a constellation of connected partners

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) sits at a clean desk with a laptop open in front of him. He's mid-handshake across the desk with a person seen from behind — only their hand and shoulder visible. Between them on the desk, the laptop screen shows a simple teal checkmark. The setting is a glass-walled meeting room with warm natural light. Sam's expression is confident and professional. Close-medium shot focused on the handshake and Sam's face. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam shakes hands across a desk with a laptop showing a teal checkmark between them — setting up a new commercial relationship

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) stands in front of a large wall screen in a bright agency office. On the screen, three distinct product cards float side by side — a TV screen shape representing CTV inventory, a rectangular banner shape representing display, and a circular waveform shape representing audio — each glowing in a slightly different shade of teal. Thin lines connect each card back to a small glowing briefcase icon at the top of the screen, representing the campaign brief that generated all three. Sam gestures at the middle card with one hand, the other hand on his hip, looking decisive — he's found the right mix. His silver watch catches the light. The screen dominates the frame. Medium-wide shot emphasizing the three product options and Sam's confident body language. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam gestures at three product cards on a wall screen — CTV, display, and audio inventory options all generated from one campaign brief

prompt: Maya (South Asian woman, late 20s, warm brown skin, dark hair in a loose side braid, colorful silk scarf tied at her neck, fitted denim jacket over a graphic tee) sits cross-legged on a modern sofa in a creative studio space, an iPad on her lap. Around her on the wall, large mounted screens show different ad formats at various sizes — a tall vertical rectangle, a wide horizontal banner, a square, a small rectangle — all in coordinated teal tones suggesting they were generated from the same brief. Maya gestures at one of the screens with her stylus, directing the arrangement. Plants and art supplies are visible in the background. The space feels creative and relaxed. Wide shot showing Maya surrounded by the multi-format output. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Maya sits in a creative studio with her iPad, surrounded by wall screens showing ad formats of different sizes all generated from one brief

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) presses a single button on his laptop with his index finger — a decisive, deliberate gesture. The laptop screen emits a bright teal pulse radiating outward from where his finger touches. Alex (Black woman, early 40s, locs pulled back, tortoiseshell glasses on head, charcoal blazer over white top) stands behind him with arms crossed, watching with a small satisfied smile. They are in a dim situation-room style space, the laptop glow illuminating their faces. The mood is a launch moment — tension turning to confidence. Tight medium shot focused on Sam's hand on the laptop and both their expressions. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam presses a launch button on his laptop with a teal pulse radiating from the screen, Alex standing behind him arms crossed with a satisfied smile

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) and Kai (White man, early 30s, sandy blond hair pushed back, no glasses, henley shirt under a light puffer vest) sit side by side at a long table, each with their own laptop. Between their two laptop screens, translucent teal data streams arc from Kai's screen to Sam's — a visual metaphor for signals flowing between systems. Kai leans toward Sam, pointing at Sam's screen. Sam nods. They look collaborative, two specialists combining expertise. Bright co-working space with exposed brick and large windows. Medium-wide shot showing both people and the visual connection between their screens. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam and Kai sit side by side with laptops as translucent teal data streams arc between their screens — combining campaign and signal data

prompt: Jordan (Latina woman, mid-35s, warm brown skin, dark wavy hair past shoulders, silver hoop earrings, sage-green cardigan) sits alone at a clean desk, holding a tablet at an angle. On the tablet screen, a vertical sequence of connected teal and amber circles represents a governance approval chain. Jordan studies the screen carefully, her silver hoop earrings catching the light. She has a slight furrowed brow — thoughtful, not worried. She is the gatekeeper, and she takes it seriously. A single desk lamp provides warm directional light. The background is minimal and slightly dark, creating a focused intimate atmosphere. Close-up shot emphasizing Jordan's face and the tablet. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Jordan studies a governance approval chain on her tablet, silver hoop earrings catching the lamplight, her expression focused and deliberate

prompt: Sam (Black man, early 30s, dark skin, close-cropped hair with sharp fade, no glasses, clean-shaven, light blue button-down with rolled sleeves, silver watch) stands in front of a large wall-mounted dashboard screen, holding a coffee mug. The dashboard shows abstract chart shapes — upward-trending lines and bar clusters in teal and emerald tones. Sam is mid-turn, looking back toward the viewer with a relaxed confident expression, as if saying 'we're on track.' Morning light streams through large windows to his left, casting long shadows. The mood is calm command — Sam is in control. The shot is slightly low-angle, making Sam and the dashboard feel commanding. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Sam stands before a large performance dashboard with trending charts, coffee in hand, turning back with a confident expression — everything is on track

prompt: A split composition. On the left half, a smartphone shows an online store product grid — small teal-toned product thumbnails arranged in a grid. On the right half, a laptop screen shows those same products appearing inside a campaign interface — the products flowing from phone to laptop connected by a thin glowing teal line. A pair of hands holds the phone on the left side. The laptop sits on a wooden table on the right. Between them, the connecting line has small teal dots flowing along it like data in transit. Overhead view looking down at the table, showing both devices and the connection between them. Bright, clean workspace with a potted succulent visible at the edge. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Overhead view of a phone showing a product catalog connected by a glowing teal line to a laptop campaign interface — catalog data flowing between them

prompt: Tomoko (Japanese woman, mid-40s, straight black hair in a precise bob with subtle silver streak, rectangular titanium-frame glasses, structured navy coat) stands in a modern corporate lobby, holding a phone at waist height and glancing down at it. Behind her, a large frosted glass panel displays an abstract brand identity system — a large geometric logo mark, color swatches, and visual guidelines arranged in a clean grid, all in teal tones. Tomoko's expression is composed and assured — she controls what goes out. The lobby has polished concrete floors and dramatic overhead lighting. The frosted glass panel glows softly from behind. Wide shot showing Tomoko against the full brand identity display, establishing her authority over the brand. Do not include any text, words, or labels in the image.
alt_text: Tomoko stands in a corporate lobby before a frosted glass display of brand identity elements — composed and assured, she controls what goes out
